login.title: Login
login.subtitle: Sign in with your phone number and one-time password.
login.toastCouldNotContinuePhone: Could not continue with this phone.
login.toastInvalidPhoneOrOtp: Invalid phone number or OTP code.
login.toastNoMembership: No active workspace membership for this account.
login.toastSessionNotEstablished: Session was not established. Please try again.
login.toastGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again.

register.title: Register
register.subtitle: Complete your profile to finish onboarding for this workspace.
register.toastMissingSession: Registration session is missing. Start from login again.
register.toastInviteFailed: Registration completed, but invite acceptance failed.

catalogErrors.invalidEquipmentIdsTenant: Some selected equipment is no longer in this workspace. Please review and update the tour’s gear lists.
catalogErrors.invalidTourThemeIdsTenant: Some selected tour themes are no longer in this workspace. Please review and update tour themes.
catalogErrors.invalidGuideLanguageIdsTenant: Some selected guide languages are no longer in this workspace. Please review and update guide languages.
catalogErrors.genericInvalidCatalogTenant: Some of this tour’s settings are no longer valid. Please review the selected catalog values.

new.metadataDescription: Add a new tour via the workspace API when configured.
new.pageDescription: Creates a tour via POST /api/v2/tours when the API URL is configured.
new.cardDescription: Required fields match the workspace create-tour API (MVP).
new.emptySignInDescription: Your session is missing or expired. Sign in to create tours.
new.emptyLeaderDescription: Only tour leaders can create tours in this workspace.
new.emptyApiDescription: Set NEXT_PUBLIC_API_URL in your environment to create tours.
new.mutationForbidden: You don't have permission to create tours in this workspace. If you think this is a mistake, sign in with an owner or admin account, or ask your workspace owner to update your role.
new.mutationGenericFailed: Failed to create tour. Please try again.
new.fieldTitleDescription: Make it descriptive: include destination and tour type (10–120 characters).
new.placeholderTitle: e.g. Damavand summit, 2-day tour from south face
new.fieldDescriptionFullPage: Shown on the full tour page. Aim for about 200–800 words of useful detail.
new.fieldTourTypeDescription: Top-level category of the tour (mountain, city, desert, …). Use Trip style below for the execution sub-genre (adventure, luxury, …).
new.fieldTransportDescription: Tick every organized transport option used on this tour. There is no "mixed" option—select multiple modes instead. Leave all unchecked if none apply.
new.trip_durationDaysComputedDescription: Auto-calculated from the departure and return dates (inclusive). Allowed range: 1–60.
new.checkboxAutoAccept: Automatically accept registrations until capacity is full
new.fieldSocialLinksDescription: The first link is treated as the primary communication link for current API compatibility.
new.validationTitleTooShort: Title must be at least 10 characters and clearly state the destination/type.
new.validationTitleTooLong: Title must be 120 characters or fewer.
new.validationCapacityWholeNumber: Capacity must be a whole number.
new.validationDifficultyRequiredMountain: Difficulty level is required for this event kind.
new.validationDifficultyRatingHalfStep: Difficulty must be a half-step value (e.g. 1, 1.5, 2 … 10).
new.validationMinimumAgeRequiredMountain: Minimum age is required for this event kind.
new.validationGearRequiredMountain: At least one required equipment item is needed for this event kind.
new.validationGearIdEachInvalid: Each selection must be a valid equipment id (UUID).
new.validationTourThemeIdEachInvalid: Each selected theme must be a valid id (UUID).
new.validationMeetingPointRequiredMountain: Meeting point is required for this event kind.
new.validationDepartureDateRequiredMountain: Departure date is required for this event kind.
new.validationDepartureDateNotPast: Departure date cannot be in the past.
new.validationReturnDateNotPast: Return date cannot be in the past.
new.validationReturnDateBeforeDeparture: Return date must be on or after the departure date.
new.validationTimeFormatInvalid: Time must be in HH:MM (24h) format.
new.validationAudienceOverlap: The same audience group cannot be both suitable and not suitable.
new.trip_introHelp: Optional structured details are saved separately from the marketing description above and appear in API {code}.
new.trip_fieldRequiredHint: This field is required for this event type.
new.trip_fieldRecommendedHint: Completing this field is recommended for clearer communication.
new.trip_mountainRequiredNote: For mountain tours, minimum age and at least one required equipment item are mandatory.
new.trip_tripStyleDescription: Execution sub-genre — pick every style that fits this tour (e.g. adventure + photography, or luxury + relaxed). Independent from Tour type above (mountain, city, …). Leave all unchecked if unspecified.
new.trip_difficultyMountainDescription: For mountain tours this is required and should reflect both physical load and technical challenge.
new.trip_maxAltitudeMetersDescription: Mountain tours only. Highest point reached on the route, in meters above sea level.
new.trip_tourThemesDescription: Choose one or more themes from your workspace catalog (Settings → Tour themes). Multiple selections allowed.
new.trip_tourThemesPlaceholder: Add a theme and press Enter or Add
new.trip_tourThemesLoadError: Could not load themes. Check your connection and try again.
new.trip_tourThemesEmptyHint: No tour themes yet. Add themes under Settings → Tour themes.
new.trip_audienceMatrixDescription: For each group, choose Suitable or Not suitable, or leave both unchecked. A group cannot be both at once.
new.trip_shortIntroDescription: 2–3 short sentences for tour cards, lists, and meta description (max 250 characters). Shown on cards and previews; if empty, the full description above is used on cards instead.
new.trip_dayByDayHelp: Optional structured days (day number required per row).
new.trip_fitnessDescription: Describe overall intensity (physical + technical), e.g. light hiking, heavy trekking, or technical climbing.
new.trip_experienceLevelDescription: Prior participant experience, e.g. first tour, day-hike background, or comfortable above 3000 m.
new.trip_technicalSkillDescription: Specific technical skills needed, e.g. crampons, rope work, rock contact, or technical route passages.
new.trip_minimumAgeDescription: Enforced as an admission rule; younger participants cannot be approved.
new.trip_medicalRestrictionsDescription: Conditions that could make the program unsafe, e.g. heart disease, uncontrolled asthma, or severe altitude illness history.
new.trip_gearRequiredDescription: Choose items from your workspace equipment library (Settings → Equipment).
new.trip_gearOptionalDescription: Recommended extras from your workspace equipment library.
new.trip_gearEquipmentEmptyHint: No equipment items yet. Add some under Settings → Equipment.
new.trip_gearEquipmentLoadError: Could not load equipment. Check your connection and try again.
new.trip_guideLanguagesDescription: Pick from languages configured for this workspace.
new.trip_guideLanguagesEmptyHint: No guide languages yet. A workspace owner or admin can add them for the team.
new.trip_difficultyLevelDescription: Numeric scale from 1 (very easy) to 10 (extreme), in 0.5 steps. Choose the value that best reflects the overall difficulty.

settings.hubWorkspaceDescription: Shared lists used when creating tours (locations, equipment, themes, and guide languages).
settings.hubLocationsBlurb: Regions and destinations staff pick when creating a tour—shown on the tour page.
settings.hubEquipmentBlurb: Checklist items for required/optional gear in the tour form—travelers see what to bring.
settings.hubTourThemesBlurb: Theme tags for the tour form—customers see them on tour details and in filters.
settings.hubGuideLanguagesBlurb: Languages the guide speaks—picked in the tour form and shown on the tour page.
settings.equipmentReadOnlyHint: No items yet. Ask a workspace owner or admin to add equipment here.
settings.equipmentReadOnlyBanner: View only — only owners and admins can add, edit, or reorder items.
settings.emailCardSubtitle: Used for sign-in and workspace notifications.
settings.fieldNationalIdDescription: 10 digits; Persian or Latin numerals. Leave empty if you prefer not to store it.
settings.fieldBirthDateDescription: Jalali picker; stored as Gregorian YYYY-MM-DD.
settings.validationNationalIdLength: National ID must be exactly 10 digits.
settings.validationNationalIdInvalid: This national ID is not valid.
settings.validationBirthDateInvalid: Birth date is not valid (allowed range roughly 1900 through today).
settings.loadFailedDescription: Profile could not be loaded. Check your connection and try again.
settings.saveFailedToast: Could not save settings. Please try again.
settings.validationFullNameMax: Full name must not exceed 255 characters.

meErrors.AUTH_UNAUTHENTICATED: You must sign in to continue.
meErrors.BACKEND_UNREACHABLE: Service is unavailable. Please try again later.
meErrors.TENANT_SCOPE_FORBIDDEN: You are not allowed to do this in this workspace.
meErrors.VALIDATION_FAILED: Some fields are invalid. Please check your input.
meErrors.USER_EMAIL_CONFLICT: This email is already in use.
meErrors.USER_PHONE_CONFLICT: This phone number is already registered.
meErrors.USER_PHONE_UNCHANGED: This is already your current number.
meErrors.EMAIL_VERIFICATION_INVALID: The verification link or code is invalid or has expired.
meErrors.MOBILE_OTP_INVALID_PURPOSE: The verification code cannot be used for this step.
meErrors.USER_NATIONAL_ID_INVALID: The national ID is not valid.
meErrors.USER_NATIONAL_ID_CONFLICT: This national ID is already linked to another account.
meErrors.USER_BIRTH_DATE_INVALID: The birth date is outside the allowed range.
meErrors.PROFILE_ROW_VERSION_CONFLICT: Your profile changed elsewhere. Reload settings, then try again.

settings.validationEmailTokenLength: Verification token must be exactly 64 characters.
settings.toastEmailVerificationSent: A verification email was sent to the new address. Check your inbox.
settings.emailVerifySectionLead: If you just changed your email, paste the token from the verification email here, or use the link from the email.
settings.emailVerifyFailedToast: Email verification failed. Check the token.
settings.emailVerifySectionLeadShort: Paste the 64-character token from your verification email.
settings.phoneNewDescription: To change your number, request a code, then enter it to confirm.
settings.phoneDevOtpHint: In development, code 1234 is usually accepted.
settings.phoneValidationTooShort: Enter a valid number (at least 8 significant digits).
settings.locationsMetadataDescription: Define regions and related destinations for tours.
settings.locationsPageDescription: Regions and places available as tour destinations in the create/edit tour form.
settings.locationsSectionDescription: Regions organize geography; destinations are what staff select for a tour and customers see on the page.
settings.locationsPanelIntro: Regions group geography (for example a province or country). Destinations are the concrete places—cities, peaks, trails, or lakes—that appear in the tour creation form and on the public tour page. Create regions first, then add destinations under each. Example region: Gilan; example destination: Masal trails.
settings.locationsToastFormValidation: Fix the highlighted fields, then try again.
settings.locationsEmptyRegionsDescription: Use the Add region button to create your first region.
settings.locationsEmptyDestinationsDescription: Use the Add destination button once you have at least one region.
settings.locationsEmptyDestinationsNoRegions: Create a region first, then add destinations.
settings.locationsRegionNameHint: How your team groups destinations (e.g. “Gilan”). Used when organizing the destination list.
settings.locationsCountryHint: Optional hint for admins; does not change how tours work.
settings.locationsSortOrderHint: Lower numbers appear earlier in region and destination pickers.
settings.locationsActiveHint: Inactive regions/destinations are hidden when staff create new tours.
settings.locationsDestinationNameHint: Shown to customers as the tour location; pick this in the tour form’s destination field.
settings.locationsDestinationRegionHint: Every destination sits under one region for your catalog.
settings.locationsDestinationTypeHint: Helps your team describe the place; optional for travelers.
settings.locationsAltitudeHint: Optional context for mountain or high routes (meters above sea level).
settings.locationsDestinationSortOrderHint: Lower numbers appear earlier within the region’s destination list.
settings.locationsValidationCountryMax: Country may be at most 128 characters.
settings.locationsNoDestinationsInRegionHint: Use the Add destination button or choose another filter.
settings.locationsReadOnlyBanner: View only — only owners and admins can add, edit, or reorder items.
settings.locationsReadOnlyHint: Nothing to show yet. Ask a workspace owner or admin to manage regions and destinations.
settings.locationsDeleteRegionConfirmDescription: This will remove “{name}” and its destination list from settings. Tours already using these remain unchanged until you edit them.
settings.locationsDeleteDestinationConfirmDescrip: This will remove “{name}” from the workspace list. Existing tours are not changed in this step.
settings.equipmentMetadataDescription: Manage reusable equipment items for tours.
settings.equipmentPageDescription: Gear checklist options for tours—used in the create/edit tour form and shown to travelers.
settings.equipmentSectionDescription: Each item is a row travelers may see in required/optional gear; turn items off to stop offering them on new drafts.
settings.equipmentPanelIntro: These items power the required and optional equipment checklist when staff create or edit a tour—travelers use it to know what to bring. Keep names clear and consistent. Examples: hiking boots, sleeping bag, headlamp, trekking poles.
settings.equipmentDeleteConfirmDescription: This will remove “{name}” from the workspace library. Tours are not changed in this step.
settings.equipmentFieldNameHint: Shown in the tour form checklist and to travelers on the tour page.
settings.equipmentFieldSlugHint: Stable code for data and imports (e.g. sleeping-bag). Usually lowercase Latin.
settings.equipmentFieldCategoryHint: Optional grouping for your team in this list (e.g. Clothing, Safety).
settings.equipmentFieldDescriptionHint: Optional note for staff or ops; may support future UI.
settings.equipmentFieldIconHint: Optional if your UI supports an icon beside the name.
settings.equipmentFieldSortOrderHint: Lower numbers appear earlier in equipment pickers and checklists.
settings.equipmentFieldActiveHint: Inactive items are not offered when staff configure gear on new tours.
settings.equipmentEmptyDescription: Add your first item to build a reusable list.
settings.equipmentValidationSortOrder: Sort order must be a number.
settings.tourThemesPageDescription: Theme tags for the tour form—shown on tour details and in customer filters.
settings.tourThemesSectionDescription: Tags/categories staff select when editing a tour; customers see them when browsing.
settings.tourThemesPanelIntro: Themes are tags or categories for a tour. Staff pick them in the create and edit tour form; customers see them on the tour detail page and when filtering tours. Examples: nature, historical, adventure, family.
settings.tourThemesDeleteConfirmDescription: This will remove “{name}” from the workspace library. Tours are not changed in this step.
settings.tourThemesFieldNameHint: Shown to customers on the tour page and in filters.
settings.tourThemesFieldSlugHint: Stable ID in your data (e.g. nature-hike); lowercase Latin/numbers.
settings.tourThemesFieldDescriptionHint: Optional extra context where themes are displayed.
settings.tourThemesFieldSortOrderHint: Lower numbers appear earlier in the theme picker.
settings.tourThemesFieldActiveHint: Inactive themes are hidden when staff set up new tours.
settings.tourThemesEmptyDescription: Add your first theme to build a reusable list.
settings.tourThemesReadOnlyHint: No items yet. Ask a workspace owner or admin to add themes here.
settings.tourThemesReadOnlyBanner: View only — only owners and admins can add, edit, or reorder items.
settings.tourThemesValidationSortOrder: Sort order must be a number.
settings.guideLanguagesMetadataDescription: Manage workspace guide languages for tours.
settings.guideLanguagesPageDescription: Languages the guide can speak—chosen in the tour form and shown on the tour page.
settings.guideLanguagesSectionDescription: What the guide speaks on the trip; travelers read this on the public tour detail.
settings.guideLanguagesPanelIntro: List the languages the guide can speak on a trip. Staff select them in the tour form; travelers see them on the tour page. Examples: Persian, English, Istanbul Turkish.
settings.guideLanguagesDeleteConfirmDescription: This will remove “{name}” from the workspace library. Tours are not changed in this step.
settings.guideLanguagesFieldSlugHint: Short stable code for data (e.g. fa, en, tr-tr). Distinct from the label travelers read.
settings.guideLanguagesFieldSortOrderHint: Lower numbers appear earlier in the language picker.
settings.guideLanguagesFieldActiveHint: Inactive languages are hidden when staff set up new tours.
settings.guideLanguagesEmptyDescription: Add your first language for tour logistics pickers.
settings.guideLanguagesReadOnlyHint: No items yet. Ask a workspace owner or admin to add languages here.
settings.guideLanguagesReadOnlyBanner: View only — only owners and admins can add, edit, or reorder items.
settings.guideLanguagesValidationSortOrder: Sort order must be a number.
